listings.title: 60 Fernbank Ave
listings.description: Best & Final Offers Due Tues 3/24 at 12noon Fall in love with the charm of Olde Delmar and the confidence of a home that's been meticulously cared for. This 4 bed, 2 full & 2 half bath 80's colonial offers the best of both worlds--classic character and over $176,000 in thoughtful updates by its devoted owners during their time here. Step inside to a home that instantly feels inviting with continuous hardwood flooring and lots of natural light. The heart of it all is the extensive custom kitchen featuring Cambria quartz countertops and a double oven where meals come together easily--whether it's a quick weeknight dinner, baking cookies on a Saturday afternoon, or preparing a spread for friends who linger around the table long after dessert. From here the home unfolds naturally into the spaces where life happens. Curl up with a good book in front of the cosy gas fireplace in the family room. Gather at the table in the formal dining area, or take the party outside for a BBQ on the patio. Let the sounds of summer soothe you on the screened porch while you watch the play in the ample fenced backyard. Spend lazy mornings in your spacious primary suite with airy vaulted ceiling and huge walk in closet plus own bathroom with updated vanity. All your crew will love how large the freshly painted bedrooms are and getting ready in the morning in a totally updated chic main bathroom complete with huge double vanity. Bonus finished basement rec room & half bath will become one of your favorite rooms in the house. Laundry day is a breeze in the handy 1st fl laundry area. New Central A/C Unit is less than a year old plus most of the windows were new in 2022. Ask for the full list of extensive updates. There is nothing to do but move right in to this beloved beauty in the award winning Bethlehem School District.
